seoTitle: Yeo vs Yeodene — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yeo and Yeodene. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yeo and Yeodene.
heading: Yeo vs Yeodene — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yeo, Victoria and Yeodene, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yeo has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Yeodene (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yeo or Yeodene safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yeo has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Yeodene scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yeo scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Yeodene scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yeo or Yeodene?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yeo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
